proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `age_years` is associated with longer `pfs_months` after adjustment for clinical status, biomarkers, metastatic features, and treatments.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated +0.1757 months of PFS per additional year of age (SE 0.0005; z=343.6).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ecog_ps` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` after adjustment for clinical status, biomarkers, metastatic features, and treatments.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -1.1717 months of PFS per one-point increase in ECOG performance status (SE 0.0075; z=-156.0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0 after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -1.5487 months for stage IV disease versus non-stage-IV disease (SE 0.0111; z=-139.4).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients without brain metastases after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated +0.5315 months for ER-positive disease (SE 0.0149; z=35.6).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients without `pik3ca_mutation` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.5816 months for PIK3CA mutation (SE 0.0107; z=-54.4).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `her2_positive` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than HER2-negative patients after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.4710 months for HER2-positive disease (SE 0.0142; z=-33.2).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ki67_pct` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.0189 months per one percentage-point increase in Ki-67 (SE 0.0004; z=-45.2).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with longer `pfs_months` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated +0.4757 months per 1 g/dL higher albumin (SE 0.0101; z=46.9).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.0768 months per one percentage-point higher 6-month weight loss (SE 0.0013; z=-58.2).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ldh_u_l` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.0005 months per U/L higher LDH (SE about 0.0001; z=-8.2), a statistically significant but small effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_palbociclib` equal to 1 have longer `pfs_months` than patients without palbociclib after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated +1.1014 months for palbociclib treatment (SE 0.0107; z=103.1).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_tamoxifen` equal to 1 have longer `pfs_months` than patients without tamoxifen after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.0075 months for tamoxifen treatment (SE 0.0111; z=-0.7), providing no evidence of longer PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_trastuzumab` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `her2_positive` equal to 1 than in HER2-negative patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_trastuzumab by her2_positive interaction was +0.0219 months (SE 0.0326; z=0.7), not statistically significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_olaparib` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `brca1_mutation` or `brca2_mutation` than in BRCA-wildtype patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + treatment_olaparib:brca1_mutation
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_olaparib by brca1_mutation interaction was +0.0774 months (SE 0.1105; z=0.7), not significant.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_olaparib by brca2_mutation interaction was -0.0448 months (SE 0.1111; z=-0.4), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is more positive in triple-negative tumors defined by `er_positive` = 0, `pr_positive` = 0, and `her2_positive` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + treatment_pembrolizumab:triple_negative
analyses.result_summary: The pembrolizumab by triple-negative interaction was +0.0326 months (SE 0.0349; z=0.9), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 than in ER-negative patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + treatment_palbociclib:er_positive
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_palbociclib by er_positive interaction was +1.5585 months (SE 0.0222; z=70.2). Raw subgroup differences were +1.577 months in ER-positive patients and -0.017 months in ER-negative patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 1 than in PIK3CA-wildtype patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + treatment_palbociclib:pik3ca_mutation
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_palbociclib by pik3ca_mutation interaction was -1.6653 months (SE 0.0212; z=-78.7). Raw subgroup differences were +1.659 months in PIK3CA-wildtype patients and +0.036 months in mutated patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After accounting for `er_positive` and `pik3ca_mutation` effect modification, the positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is still slightly larger in patients with `pr_positive` equal to 1.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + treatment_palbociclib:er_positive + treatment_palbociclib:pr_positive + treatment_palbociclib:pik3ca_mutation + pik3ca_mutation:er_positive
analyses.result_summary: In the simultaneous palbociclib interaction model, treatment_palbociclib by pr_positive was +0.0575 months (SE 0.0264; z=2.2), a small but statistically significant increment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between `pik3ca_mutation` and `pfs_months` is stronger in patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 than in ER-negative patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + pik3ca_mutation:er_positive
analyses.result_summary: The pik3ca_mutation by er_positive interaction was -0.8260 months (SE 0.0230; z=-36.0). In the simultaneous palbociclib interaction model it was -0.8392 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` and `pfs_months` is more positive in triple-negative tumors defined by `er_positive` = 0, `pr_positive` = 0, and `her2_positive` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:triple_negative
analyses.result_summary: The sacituzumab govitecan by triple-negative interaction was +0.0473 months (SE 0.0411; z=1.1), not significant. The adjusted main effect was borderline and tiny (+0.0334 months; p=0.0495).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is less positive in patients with high systemic inflammation, defined as `nlr` >= 4, than in patients with `nlr` < 4.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + treatment_pembrolizumab:I(nlr >= 4)
analyses.result_summary: The pembrolizumab by high-NLR interaction was -0.0607 months (SE 0.0309; z=-2.0), borderline statistically significant and small.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between `stage_iv` and `pfs_months` is more severe in patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 than in patients without brain metastases.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + stage_iv:has_brain_mets
analyses.result_summary: The stage_iv by has_brain_mets interaction was +0.0074 months (SE 0.0367; z=0.2), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between `stage_iv` and `pfs_months` is more severe in patients with low albumin, defined as `albumin_g_dl` < 3.5, than in patients with `albumin_g_dl` >= 3.5.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators + stage_iv:I(albumin_g_dl < 3.5)
analyses.result_summary: The stage_iv by low-albumin interaction was -0.0214 months (SE 0.0259; z=-0.8), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `brca1_mutation` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients without `brca1_mutation` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + her2_amplification + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ldh_u_l + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + all treatment indicators
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.0689 months for brca1_mutation (SE 0.0323; z=-2.1), statistically significant but clinically small.
